data.current_description: Uses AI to generate a customized, personalized response to a Google review based on the review content, rating, and desired tone.
data.description_suggestion: Uses AI to generate a customized, personalized response to a Google review based on the review content, rating, and desired tone. Accepts review text, rating, and tone preference as inputs. Returns the generated reply text ready for posting. Does not automatically publish the reply—it must be reviewed and manually posted to Google.
